brand_dna.category: Bulk beef jerky and high-protein snacks sold direct-to-consumer, including multi-flavor 'Protein Station' variety packs.
brand_dna.core_belief: Snacking should hit hard on protein and flavor - 'Strong American Snacks' built to fuel real appetites, not dainty portions.
proof_points: Sold in bulk quantities with tiered Protein Station packs (Mega Double Wide vs Mini Single Wide)
Free shipping offered above a cart threshold
Wholesale program available for larger buyers
brand_dna.positioning: Bold, value-forward bulk snacking for heavy protein eaters, not a boutique or single-bag artisanal jerky brand.

voice_pillars.name: Bold and American
voice_pillars.desc: Writes with a proud, punchy, all-American tone that leans into strength and appetite.
voice_pillars.quote: Bulk Beef Jerky - Strong American Snacks

voice_pillars.name: Protein-Forward
voice_pillars.desc: Centers everything on protein volume and fuel, naming products as 'Protein Stations'.

voice_pillars.name: Go Big
voice_pillars.desc: Frames the product around size and quantity, using scale language like Mega, Double Wide, and Bulk.

icp: Protein-hungry snackers - lifters, hunters, truckers, and busy men - who want a lot of high-protein beef jerky at a fair price and buy in bulk to keep it stocked.

personas.name: The Gym Fuel Guy
personas.description: Fitness-focused buyer who tracks protein and stocks up in bulk - moved by protein-per-serving and value angles.

personas.name: The Bulk Stocker
personas.description: Household or pantry shopper who buys the Mega Double Wide to always have snacks on hand - moved by quantity and free shipping.

personas.name: The Wholesale Buyer
personas.description: Retailer or reseller sourcing jerky at volume - moved by the wholesale program and case pricing.

offers: Free shipping once cart reaches the qualifying threshold
Two pack tiers: Mega Protein Station Double Wide ($100) and Mini Protein Station Single Wide ($60)

allowed.claim: Beef jerky sold in bulk quantities
Protein Station variety packs in Mega and Mini sizes
Free shipping available on qualifying orders

banned.claim: The best beef jerky in America / #1 jerky
banned.why: FTC - unqualified superlative that cannot be substantiated.

banned.claim: Guaranteed to build muscle or hit your protein goals
Rated 5 stars by thousands of customers
banned.why: FTC - invented review counts; no reviews exist in the input.

banned.claim: Only X packs left - order in the next 10 minutes
banned.why: FTC - fake urgency not backed by real inventory data.
FTC - objective ingredient claim not stated or substantiated on the site.

banned.claim: Endorsed by pro athletes or trainers
banned.why: FTC - invented endorsement with no evidence in the input.
